titlestmt.titleproper: Kappa Delta Rho. Beta Chapter records37-4-2130
titlestmt.author: Compiled by M. Warren, G. Haas

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-02-07 23:57:16 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Kappa Delta Rho. Beta Chapter records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Fraternity of Kappa Delta Rho. Beta Chapter (Cornell University)

did.physdesc: Minutes, certificates, correspondence, photographs, pamphlets, and pledge meeting cards.
did.abstract: Minutes, certificates, correspondence, photographs, pamphlets, and pledge meeting cards of Kappa Delta Rho fraternity at Cornell University. Also includes correspondence of William I. Myers and files kept by Horace Shackelton, 1942-1988.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Minutes, certificates, correspondence, photographs, pamphlets, and pledge meeting cards of Kappa Delta Rho fraternity at Cornell University. Also includes correspondence of William I. Myers and files kept by Horace Shackelton, 1942-1988. KDR pin belonging to Robert R. Usher '21.

arrangement.head: SERIES LIST
arrangement.p: Series I. Early Correspondence, Alphabetical by Name Box 1
Series II. Early Records: Individuals (with photos) Box 1
Series V. Miscellaneous Fraternity Items Box 1, 2, Mapcase Folder 1
Series VIII. Files of Horace Shackelton Box 3

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Kappa Delta Rho. Beta Chapter records, #37-4-2130. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Series I. Early Correspondence, Alphabetical by Name
Series II. Early Records: Individuals (with photos)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection contains mostly names S-Z, only a few records of letters A-R.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Certificate of Incorporation, other legal documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Tax-Exempt Status

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Digitized Files, 2005-2012 and a listing of the files.

did.unittitle: ΚΔΡ pin belonging to Robert R. Usher (class of 1921)
Drawing-Alternative plans for addition to the house

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Signed by Horace Shackelton

did.unittitle: Series VIII: Files of Horace Shackelton

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Speech by Horace Shackelton and Weekend Program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Beta Briefs, brochure, minutes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Beta Briefs, Board of Directors minutes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes minutes, membership lists, Proposal for the Installation of an Automatic Fire Detection and Manual Alarm System, letters.

did.unittitle: ΚΔΡ Guest Book, Quill and Scroll, etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Quill and Scroll, 1913-1922 Guest Book, Beta Briefs

did.unittitle: ΚΔΡ Minutes, Circular letters, Purchase Agreement, Finance Statement

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letters, Beta Briefs, Programs, Minutes

did.unittitle: General Plans and Letters for Reactivating

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: See also: Plans of the original 312 Highland Road house before addition (Map Case)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence and financial records

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence, financial records, Beta Briefs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes notes, correspondence, proposal

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: Article "Mamalutes Colonize", financial records, correspondence, notes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: Correspondence, notes, Beta briefs. See also: alternative plans for the addition to the house (map case)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: correspondence

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: Notes, correspondence, Beta Briefs,

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: Correspondence (Including letter from Norton Electric Company concerning McNiel-Mitchell Multiple Residence Law), Quill and Scroll, Beta Briefs, Invitations

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: Correspondence, Newsletter, Quill and Scroll

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: Materials pertaining to the sale of the 306 Highland Road chapter house, etc.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes Beta Briefs, correspondence

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: Minutes, Correspondence

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: Responses to surveys, correspondence

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: Minutes, correspondence (in connection with the future of Beta Chapter due to World War 2)

did.unittitle: ΚΔP Correspondence- Issues with Delta Chapter

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerns about the reinstatement of Delta Chapter of Kappa Delta Rho

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence with Steven B. Blum, Attorney at Law

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes: Beta Briefs, Quill and Scroll, Minutes, Correspondence, etc.
